/usr/bin/cc   -DLSQUIC_DEBUG_NEXT_ADV_TICK=1 -DLSQUIC_CONN_STATS=1 -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O0 -g3  -I/Users/divya/lsquic/lsquic/boringssl/include -DHAVE_BORINGSSL -DLSQUIC_TEST=1 -Wno-unused-value -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_minmax.dir/test_minmax.c.o CMakeFiles/test_minmax.dir/__/src/liblsquic/lsquic_minmax.c.o -o test_minmax   -L/usr/local/lib
